title: Claudia — Your Platform Assistant
subtitle: Meet Claudia, the AI assistant who helps you navigate, draft, and manage your civic identity.

steps.title: Who is Claudia?
steps.description:
Claudia is your AI platform assistant. She appears as a floating "C" bubble in the bottom-right corner of every page. She can navigate you to pages, update your profile, search the web, help you draft mandates, and answer questions about the platform.

She speaks using text-to-speech and listens via your microphone. You can type or talk to her.
steps.alt: The Claudia bubble icon in the bottom-right corner of the page

steps.title: Open the Chat Panel
steps.description: Click the "C" bubble to open Claudia's chat panel. You'll see a text input at the bottom, a microphone button for voice input, and a Send button. The header shows her name and controls for settings, pop-out, and minimize.
steps.alt: Claudia chat panel open showing the input area and header controls

steps.title: Settings
steps.description:
Click the gear icon in the header to open settings:

- Voice Mode — Claudia listens to your microphone and responds by voice
- Earphones — optimizes audio playback for earphone use
- Web Search — allows Claudia to search the web for current information
- Scratchpad — a temporary notepad for pinning responses
- Clear Conversation — wipes the chat history

Toggle each setting on or off.
steps.alt: Claudia settings panel showing Voice Mode, Earphones, Web Search, Scratchpad, and Clear toggles

steps.title: Ask a Question
steps.description:
Type a question in the input box and click Send (or press Enter). Claudia responds in the chat panel. She knows about every page on the platform, your profile, your location, and your representatives.

Examples:
- "What is The People's Pulse?"
- "How do I verify my phone?"
- "Show me the polls"
steps.alt: Claudia chat showing a question and response

steps.title: Navigation Commands
steps.description:
Claudia can take you to any page on the platform. Say or type:

- "Go to Talk"
- "Take me to my profile"
- "Open elections"
- "Show me polls"
- "Go to Putnam"

She navigates your browser directly — no need to find the link yourself.

steps.title: Profile Updates
steps.description:
Claudia can update your profile fields by voice or text:

- "Change my first name to Maria"
- "Set my email to maria@example.com"
- "Update my street address"
- "Set my town to Putnam, CT"

She confirms each change and warns you if re-verification is needed (e.g. changing your email).

steps.title: Voice Mode
steps.description:
Toggle Voice Mode in settings. When on, a voice state bar appears showing IDLE, LISTENING, or SPEAKING. Claudia listens through your microphone and speaks her responses aloud.

Earphones mode adjusts audio so her speech doesn't echo back into the microphone. Turn this on if using headphones.
steps.alt: Voice bar showing LISTENING state with microphone active

steps.title: Web Search
steps.description:
Toggle Web Search in settings. When enabled, Claudia can search the internet for current information — news, legislation, representative actions, and more. She'll cite what she finds.

Web search uses the local AI pipeline, so there's no extra API cost.

steps.title: Pop-Out Mode
steps.description:
Click the pop-out arrow in the header to open Claudia in a separate window. This lets you keep chatting while browsing the site in the main window. Navigation commands from the pop-out control the main window.

Click the minimize button to collapse Claudia back to the bubble.

steps.title: Tips
steps.description:
- Claudia is available on every page — look for the "C" bubble
- She remembers your conversation within a session (cleared on page refresh)
- Voice mode works best with earphones to prevent echo
- She can't access external accounts (email, bank, etc.) — only TPB platform data
- If AI is temporarily unavailable, Claudia shows a friendly message and you can continue without her
- Type "help" to see what she can do on the current page
